stemHtml: An inertial reference and navigation system is a "strapdown" system when:

options.a: only the gyroscopes, and not the accelerometers, are fixed regarding to the aircraft`s body axes co-ordinate system.
options.b: the gyroscopes and the accelerometers are fixed regarding to the aircraft`s body axes co-ordinate system.
options.c: the gyroscopes and the accelerometers are mounted on a stabilised platform.
options.d: only the gyroscopes, and not the accelerometers, are mounted on a stabilised platform.
